name: Preview bail safer recommendation uses one untraced glob
query: TurboSnap is bailing through `.storybook/preview.ts`. We already traced the changed files and want the smallest valid fix plus the safer recommendation.
context: Diagnosis so far is `TS_BAIL_STORYBOOK_FILE`. The preview-entry analysis shows the minimal technical set explicitly, but the broader safer recommendation spans `.storybook`, `src/themes.tsx`, `packages/styles/global/*`, `storybook/blocks/**`, and `storybook/docs-manifest.json`. A draft answer currently emits one `--untraced` line per path.
expected_behavior: Keeps the minimal technical fix explicit instead of glob-compressing it
Renders the safer recommended fix as one `--untraced` picomatch pattern rather than repeated per-path flags
Uses a monorepo-safe single-glob shape that can cover disjoint roots
Excludes `.storybook/main.*` and `.storybook/preview.*` from the safer compressed pattern by default
Calls out coverage risk for the broader safer recommendation
success_criteria: The recommended command does not render one `--untraced` flag per path
The response preserves a distinct minimal technical section and safer recommendation section
The safer recommendation keeps Storybook entry files traced unless the case explicitly proves otherwise
